title: Bake headless Chromium into the Hermes sandbox base, browse via L7 proxy with strict NSS CA trust
rationale: Sandboxes had agent-browser + Playwright code but no Chromium binary because Dockerfile.base dropped upstream's playwright install; runtime download fails since the only egress is the L7 MITM proxy. Bake it in the base (rarely-changing, all sandboxes) and wire proxy routing + NSS CA import at runtime in start.sh, gated fail-safe so it can never break the gateway launch.
